case_title: LAWRENCE REESE RESPONDENT VS. CITY TOW APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
MINUTES FOR MAR-05-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2003 - DUE TO THE UNTIMELY FILING OF THE APPEAL, JUDGMENT BELOW IS ORDERED REINSTATED FOR PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE REESE AND AGAINST DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW FOR $3,000.00, AND $50.00 AS COSTS. PURS. STIP. OF PARTIES, COURT ORDERS PET. TO CORR. NAME ON JUDGMENT SET FOR MARCH 20, 2003, AT 8:30 A.M. IN SCD 506, BE HEARD BEFORE THIS COURT; FURTHER, PET. TO CORR. NAME IN JUDGMENT IS GRANTED, WITH "CITY TOW" CORRECTED TO READ, "THE CITY TOW".
STIPULATION AND ORDER STIP. TO USE JPT AND ORDER THEREON
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT CITY TOW AS TO RESPONDENT REESE, LAWRENCE HEARING SET FOR MAR-05-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
